author: Stuttered
text:
human-gate: stage plugin sync reports for review

bl sync gains --review/--apply/--discard/--list-staged. Plugin
SyncReports land under .balls/local/pending-sync/sync/<id>.json
instead of applying immediately. The gate is a pre-apply hold,
not a competing commit, so state-branch HEAD stays put during
--review. --apply replays through apply_sync_report so per-item
warn-and-continue semantics match live sync exactly.

Layout is event-keyed under pending-sync/ to leave room for
claim/review/close gating to land later without a schema change.
